solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        max_score = 0
        max_prev = values[0] + 0  # values[i] + i
        for j in range(1, len(values)):
            current_score = max_prev + values[j] - j
            max_score = max(max_score, current_score)
            max_prev = max(max_prev, values[j] + j)
        return max_score
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution iterates through the list once, maintaining the maximum value of (values[i] + i) seen so far. For each j, it calculates the score using the best i < j and updates the maximum score. This approach ensures optimal time and space efficiency.
